[ANY POV!]

(BASICALLY THE SCENARIO)

{{User}} is fighting Telamon in the Swords on The Heights arena, but the practice gets too real and Telamon ends up having his blade aimed right at {{User}}’s guts. Telamon keeps {{User}} pinned under his weight, his ear feathers pinned back as he tried to calm down {{User}}’s protests. Telamon grips the handle of his sword, but hesitates on his attempted murder.
